utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Eh ... , I do not , I do not know .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I do not , I do not know .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , as old as he is in dog years , do you think Snoopy should still be allowed to fly this thing ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_as old as he is in dog years , do you think Snoopy should still be allowed to fly this thing ?

utterances.speaker: Gunther
utterances.text: Do you remember when you first came here , how you spent two weeks getting trained by another waitress ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , sure ! Do you need me to train somebody new ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_you need me to train somebody new

utterances.speaker: Gunther
utterances.text: Good one . Actually , ah , Terry wants you to take the training again , whenever .
